User Stories: Service Orders, Tasks, MiniTasks, WorkLogs

Sequence: Create Task and Assign Sectors

Sequence: Create WorkLog with Material Deduction
Service Order PENDING State
nodes.rationale: Entry state for a new Service Order â€” allows editing, activation, and deletion before committing to work.

nodes.label: Service Order ARCHIVED State
nodes.rationale: Auto-archived after 90 days. Represents final resting state for completed/cancelled service orders.

nodes.label: Loan Workflow Constraint (workflow_type=loan)
nodes.rationale: Loan SOs use same state machine but are locked to exactly 2 tasks: Emprestimo de Equipamento and Devolucao de Equipamento. Equipment tracked via work_log_equipment instead of materials. Completion of Devolucao triggers SO closure.

nodes.label: Work Log DRAFT State
nodes.rationale: Materials can be added/removed. Stock not yet deducted. Allows workers to iterate on work log content before submission.

nodes.label: Work Log APPROVED State
nodes.rationale: Final state. Stock confirmed deducted. Drives upward completion propagation through Mini-Task.

nodes.label: Work Log REJECTED State
nodes.rationale: Stock returned to inventory. Worker can modify and resubmit, enabling an iterative correction loop.

nodes.label: Material PENDING_DEDUCTION State
nodes.rationale: Stock reserved when Work Log DRAFT is created. Released if WL rejected. Prevents double-booking of materials.

nodes.label: Upward Completion Propagation Pattern
nodes.rationale: Completion cascades upward: all WorkLogs done -> MiniTask done -> Task done -> ServiceOrder done. This pattern ensures system consistency without manual intervention.

nodes.label: Actor: Admin
nodes.rationale: System administrator with full access â€” manages users, roles, audit, and materials.

nodes.label: UML Use Case Authentication & User Management
RBAC â€” Role-Based Access Control
nodes.rationale: Roles define what actions users can perform. Permissions are assigned to roles. Admin exclusively manages the RBAC configuration.

nodes.label: UML Use Case Service Orders & Tasks Workflow
Equipment Loan Workflow
nodes.rationale: Special SO subtype (workflow_type=loan). Auto-generates exactly 2 tasks. Equipment tracked via work_log_equipment table, not materials. Devolucao task completion triggers SO closure.

nodes.label: UML Use Case Work Logs & Materials Workflow
Stock Deduction on Work Log Approval
nodes.rationale: System automatically deducts material stock when a work log is approved. On rejection, stock is returned. Enforces inventory consistency without manual stock management.

nodes.label: Event-Driven Notification System
nodes.rationale: System sends notifications on events. Notifications fan out to email and push mobile channels. Users can view, mark, and delete their notifications.

nodes.label: UML Use Case Master Data Management
Master Data Management
nodes.rationale: Admin manages service types, geography, units, and materials. Manager handles location-specific data and client management. Separation ensures data integrity at the right authority level.
